---
title: Mykala Dawn Robertson
last: Robertson
middle: Dawn
first: Mykala
people_group: gradstudent
education: M.S. | Cornell University <br> A.S | Amarillo College <br> B.S. | West
  Texas A&M University
subtitle: Ph.D. Student, Entomology
blurb: My research interests include integrated pest and pollinator management (IPPM),
  precision agriculture, and agroecology with the goal of providing innovative and
  accessible extension decision-making resources. I am especially passionate about
  better understanding agricultural landscapes to develop IPPM solutions that will
  support growers’ needs while creating minimal negative disruptions to the surrounding
  ecosystem. I am currently leading projects focused on IPM of thrips (Thysanoptera)
  in high tunnel tomato systems and using computer vision and machine learning to
  create a smart sticky trap that will inform a pest forecasting model for thrips
  management in high tunnels.
description: she/her
image: ../_images/robertson-mykala.jpg
toc: false
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications.ejs
  contents: ../../publications/**/*.qmd
  sort: pub_number desc
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: Robertson, M.
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: ../_images/robertson-mykala.jpg
  links:
  - icon: envelope
    text: Email
    href: mdr5919@psu.edu
  - text: ORCID
    href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4486-8261
  - icon: github
    text: GitHub
    href: mdr227
  - icon: linkedin
    text: LinkedIn
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mykala-robertson
---

<hr>

::: {#about}

{{< meta blurb >}}

## Education

{{< meta education >}}

<br>
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
